About

A builder who
codes, narrates,
and quantifies.

I started writing code at 15, before I had a laptop. Android, Termux, and a stubborn refusal to wait for the right tools. Today I build full-stack Django apps, ship client projects on Railway and Vercel, and narrate in Nigerian, UK, and US English for radio and online clients.

I study Statistics and Economics at the University of Nigeria, Nsukka, because I want to understand not just how to build systems, but why they behave the way they do. My work spans development, voice, and data. Three disciplines, one person.

2021

First line of code, age 15

Taught myself Python and web basics entirely on Android using Pydroid 3. No laptop. No excuses.

2022

Django and first voice work

Began building Django backends and simultaneously started picking up voice acting, developing a versatile multi-accent range through practice scripts and client demos.

2023

Broadcast credits: SoundCity Radio and Max FM

Landed professional broadcast voice work at two major Abuja stations. Crossed 200+ narrated scripts and deepened audio engineering skills.

2024

University of Nigeria, Nsukka

Enrolled in Statistics and Economics (200L, CGPA 4.09/5.0). Built MillerHoldings e-commerce from scratch while managing coursework. Launched codewithMiller freelance brand.

2025

Client deployments and ExamHub

Delivered Joy's Luxury (fashion e-commerce, Railway + PostgreSQL + Cloudinary) and Joy's Bale Ankara (CJDropshipping API integration). Built ExamHub Django exam platform deployed on Vercel with AI question generation via Anthropic API.

Now

Ride-hailing safety app and GKS target

Architecting a dual-mode transport safety platform with EDA (Celery/Redis), PostGIS geo queries, and government API integration. Long-term target: GKS Graduate Scholarship.

Selected Work

Things I built
and shipped.

E-commerce / Client Project

Lawkaz Coffee World

Luxury coffee brand site built for a real Abuja client. Features custom UI, a reservation system, product shop, and dark-mode premium aesthetic. Deployed and live.

Django Tailwind CSS PostgreSQL Vercel JavaScript
Live Site GitHub

Flagship / Full-Stack

MillerHoldings

My primary e-commerce build. Cart, wishlist, order processing, product variants, gender-filtered categories, animated sidebar nav, and a full auth system. 450+ lines in base.html alone. Iterating since 2024.

Django Inter / Playfair Tailwind jQuery PostgreSQL Cloudinary
GitHub

Client Project / Dropshipping

Joy's Bale Ankara

Django fashion lookbook with live CJDropshipping API product sync. WhatsApp-redirect ordering flow. No payment gateway complexity. Deployed on Railway with PostgreSQL.

Django CJDropshipping API Railway PostgreSQL WhatsApp API

SaaS / EdTech

ExamHub

Django exam platform with randomized question order, leaderboard, profile system, admin editing, and AI-generated questions via the Anthropic API. Deployed on Vercel with Neon Postgres. Built for real student use at UNN.

Django Anthropic API Neon PostgreSQL Vercel Python
GitHub

In Development / Infrastructure

Transport Safety Platform

Dual-mode (Spot and Ride + Order and Ride) ride-hailing app with a government-integrated safety layer. Event-driven architecture using Celery and Redis. PostGIS for geospatial queries, geohashing for proximity matching. Built for the Nigerian market.

Django Celery / Redis PostGIS Geohashing Government API EDA

Architecture phase
